title: Customizable SharePoint connector (Beta)
body:
The standard SharePoint connector offers more flexibility than the managed SharePoint connector. It allows you to ingest structured, semi-structured, and unstructured files into Delta tables with full control over schema inference, parsing options, and transformations. To get started, see [Ingest files from SharePoint](/aws/en/ingestion/sharepoint).

For an in-depth comparison of the SharePoint connectors, see [Choose your SharePoint connector](/aws/en/ingestion/sharepoint#compare-connectors).
